channel.title: Religion on amcs :: creative stuff
channel.description: Recent content in Religion on amcs :: creative stuff

item.title: Wasteland
item.description: They wandered the wasteland through ruined counties and barren states asking the same question again and again. “We prayed, we were righteous and God was on our side so how did we lose the war?”

item.title: Reward
item.description: They promised us a just reward in paradise if we did terrible things in the name of our god. But they were as wrong as this hellish limbo is empty.
